jacky.name: Jacky
jacky.description: It's Jacky's PC. You learn from Jacky.

resource_limits._note: AI workloads cap at 75% CPU (project baseline). May burst to 90% when needed or when user is idle.

gpu_thermal._note: Hard stop for local work at 75C on the RTX 3090. Within 5C of that (>=70C) we back off threads and prefer small models / free cloud. Separate concern: the 980 Pro NVMe throttles under heavy sustained I/O, mitigated by loading models sequentially, not by these temps.

situation_assessment._note: How often the dashboard re-reads the situation, and the CPU/RAM pressure thresholds that force escalation when GPU telemetry is unavailable.

_enabled_bots_note: Local automation helpers (files in bots/). Security monitoring is handled separately by the user, so security_bot is not started here.
_named_cloud_bots_note: The two named cloud backup identities. jacky -> Gemini (free), claude_jr -> Claude Haiku (cheap). Used only when the situation assessor says local is unsafe. Removed: johnny_ai, onslaught_ai, xai_backup.

cloud_bots.note: Free escalation tier — the safety net, NOT the primary. Tried in order; first with keys + success wins; falls back to local. xAI paid backup removed.
